channel.title: GitHub Shell Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: SeleniumHQ/docker-selenium
item.description: Provides a simple way to run Selenium Grid with Chrome, Firefox, and Edge using Docker, making it easier to perform browser automation

item.title: QwenLM/Qwen2.5
item.description: Qwen2.5 is the large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

item.title: itzg/docker-minecraft-server
item.description: Docker image that provides a Minecraft Server that will automatically download selected version at startup

item.title: pystardust/ani-cli
item.description: A cli tool to browse and play anime

item.title: ublue-os/bluefin
item.description: The next generation Linux workstation, designed for reliability, performance, and sustainability.

item.title: ublue-os/bazzite
item.description: Bazzite is a cloud native image built upon Fedora Atomic Desktops that brings the best of Linux gaming to all of your devices - including your favorite handheld.

item.title: acmesh-official/acme.sh
item.description: A pure Unix shell script implementing ACME client protocol

item.title: DaoCloud/public-image-mirror
item.description: 很多镜像都在国外。比如 gcr 。国内下载很慢，需要加速。致力于提供连接全世界的稳定可靠安全的容器镜像服务。

item.title: WhatsApp/proxy
item.description: This repository contains the WhatsApp proxy implementation for users to host their own proxy infrastructure to connect to WhatsApp for chat (VoIP is not currently supported)

item.title: drwetter/testssl.sh
item.description: Testing TLS/SSL encryption anywhere on any port
